MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-09-491403 WITH CASE CGC-10-497472
Off Calendar Jun-25-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT HARTFORD FIRE INSURANCE COMPANY MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-09-491403 WITH CASE CGC-10-497472. Appearances: Gregg N. Dulik, Esq. of Sedgwick Detert, Oran & Arnold LLP (415) 781-7900, appearing for defendant and Moving party; Stephanie M. Rocha, of Miller Morton (408) 292-1765 appearing for Hensel Phelps Construction Co.; Michael Wilson, Jr., Esq. of Gordon & Rees LLP (415) 986-5900, appearing for Perkins & Will. Hearing held and argued. Ruling: Motion to consolidate actions is granted for all purposes, including trial. Case No. CGC-09-491403 is designated as the lead case number. Order signed in open Court.(302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
